statement: Volume confirmation is predictive when participation and volatility are in an expansion confirmed regime, but not in neutral, fatigue, pressure_loaded_range, or liquidity_constrained regimes.

revision_history.previous_statement: Volume confirmation is predictive when participation and volatility expand together, regardless of the regime subtype.
revision_history.updated_statement: Volume confirmation is predictive when participation and volatility expand together, regardless of the regime subtype, but only in expansion confirmed regimes.
revision_history.change_reason: split from parent principle f3667c62 due to contradictions

revision_history.updated_statement: Volume confirmation is not predictive when participation and volatility expand together, regardless of the regime subtype, in neutral, fatigue, pressure_loaded_range, or liquidity_constrained regimes.
revision_history.change_reason: split from parent principle f3667c62 due to contradictions
